subject: Fermi GBM trigger 557014342/180826925 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 557014342/180826925
at 22:12:17.92 UT on 26 August 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
